Title: Simulate Queue Operations
Description:
Simulate a queue given N operations. After all operations, output the front element. If empty, output `EMPTY`.

Operations: `ENQUEUE x`, `DEQUEUE`, `FRONT`.
First line: N. Next N lines: operations.

**Constraints:**
- 1 <= N <= 500,000
- DEQUEUE never called on empty queue
- Expected complexity: O(N)
